REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (140 Bradford Street, San Francisco,Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Ismael Junio.

The sale was confirmed at $840,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed February 28, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $86,000.00 is required. The balance of $754,500.00 is to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for a blocked account was set for April 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The ex parte petition to increase bond and deposit funds into a blocked account was also granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Feb-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Ismael Junio.

The Court questioned why there was no accounting for the rental income for the downstairs unit in the last accounting and in this accounting. The Court also expressed concern about Ms. Patterson's status, Ms. Patterson having dificulty climbing up and down the stairs, the plan to purchase a new property, what's being paid for Ms. Patterson's care or how she is being cared for, and stated that it is wondering if the Conservatorship should be reinstated. The accounting petition was continued to February 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a declaration addressing all of the above issues as well as the Trustee's fee request.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Substituted Judgment To Amend Revocable Trust Established Pursuant To Court Order
Off Calendar Aug-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello Court appointed Counsel for Theresa Patterson. Avid Alavi Court appointed Counsel for Samuel Patterson. Trisha Friedeberg for Ismael Junio (Conservator).

Counsel explained the reasons for the amendment to the Trust with regard to section 6.1(a), reported as to Mr. and Mrs. Patterson's understanding of the changes made and stated that Mr. and Mrs. Patterson would receive income and discretionary distribution of the principal. Ms. Friedeberg stated that her Client wanted to effectuate his Grandmother's wishes. Ms. Alavi and Ms. Robello requested to be discharged. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
